subcodes.first_line: O friends, O faithful ones! I am bewildered as to what I should write. Shall I speak of the grace and bounty of the Beloved, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ای راستان متحیرم که چه نگارم از فضل و موهبت محبوب رحمانی دم زنم و یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
